semantic.role: Utility function that maps low-level database errors into typed ArchSpineError instances for the runtime DB initialization and opening stages.
responsibilities: Maps unknown or third-party errors into domain-specific ArchSpineError instances based on error message content.
Passes through existing ArchSpineError instances unchanged to preserve error type information.
Identifies read-only file system errors and maps them to RuntimeDbReadonly error code.
Identifies general database operation failures and maps them to RuntimeDbOpenFailed or RuntimeDbInitFailed based on the stage parameter.
outOfScope: General error handling not related to runtime database operations.
Logging or reporting of errors beyond mapping.
invariants: The function always returns an instance of ArchSpineError.
The function only processes errors for stages 'open' or 'init'.
The function does not throw; it always returns an ArchSpineError.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized error mapping layer for the runtime database subsystem to ensure consistent error types and messages.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era. This file is part of the initial error handling infrastructure for the database runtime.

publicSurface.description: Maps an unknown error to an ArchSpineError appropriate for database runtime operations. Called by database opening and initialization logic to convert low-level errors into domain-specific typed errors.

English.role: Utility function that maps low-level database errors into typed ArchSpineError instances for the runtime DB initialization and opening stages.
responsibilities: Maps unknown or third-party errors into domain-specific ArchSpineError instances based on error message content.
Passes through existing ArchSpineError instances unchanged to preserve error type information.
Identifies read-only file system errors and maps them to RuntimeDbReadonly error code.
Identifies general database operation failures and maps them to RuntimeDbOpenFailed or RuntimeDbInitFailed based on the stage parameter.
outOfScope: General error handling not related to runtime database operations.
Logging or reporting of errors beyond mapping.

exports.name: mapRuntimeDbError
exports.signature:
mapRuntimeDbError(
  error: unknown,
  stage: 'open' | 'init',
  dbPath: string,
)
